General.Name: AMA Corp PLC
General.Description: AMA Corporation Plc, an investment holding company, engages in the research and development of remote assistance and videoconference solutions in France, the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, Hong Kong, China, Japan, Italy, Shanghai, and Spain. The company offers XpertEye suite that provides assisted reality, remote assistance, dynamic workflow management, AI-enhanced yools, and customizable optimization solutions. It also provides XE aR, browser-based solution enabling customers to work together remotely on any own compatible devices, including smartphones, tablets, and portable computers; and XE aR+, same features as XE aR, plus the ability to work hands-free with smart glasses and the possibility to connect third-party devices to a smartphone or tablet to address remote collaboration needs. In addition, the company offers training and project management, maintenance, technical support, and hosting services, as well as management of intellectual property rights services. AMA Corporation Plc was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Rennes, France. AMA Corporation Plc operates as a subsidiary of Guillemot Brothers S.A.
